formula_note: Direct carry-through of the IBC threshold total.
uncertainty_note: Documented civilian deaths only; excludes broader unrecorded or indirect mortality.
quality_note: Strong civilian fatality anchor for the whole period.

formula_note: Direct carry-through of IBC's documented coalition-attributed civilian death subset.
uncertainty_note: Subset of the overall civilian total, not a separate total.
quality_note: Strongest retained countrywide side-attributed civilian estimate.

formula_note: Direct carry-through of the ten-years coalition military death total.
uncertainty_note: Side-specific military subset only; does not represent all Iraqi, insurgent, militia, or other combatant losses.
quality_note: Useful as a side-specific combatant figure but not as a complete combatant numerator.

formula_note: Direct carry-through of the IBC opening-phase figure.
quality_note: Best Iraq side-attributed civilian estimate in the retained source base.

formula_note: Direct carry-through of IBC's two-year civilian total.
uncertainty_note: Civilian-only total with no episode-total actor split.
quality_note: Strong source coverage, but actor attribution at episode-total level is partial.

formula_note: Direct carry-through of the coalition-attributed subset in the IBC dossier.
uncertainty_note: Subset of the two-year civilian total.
quality_note: Useful side-attributed civilian subset for early occupation.

formula_note: Direct carry-through of the IBC ten-years peak figure.
uncertainty_note: Approximate source figure ('some 52,000'); actor attribution intentionally left null.
quality_note: Large-scale phase estimate, but not actor-separated enough for side-specific DR work.

formula_note: 4,110 (2010) + 4,147 (2011) = 8,257 civilian deaths across the drawdown row.
uncertainty_note: Two separate annual totals aggregated into one late-war episode; actor attribution remains incomplete.
quality_note: Usable phase total, but not actor-separated and not denominator-ready.
